--- create_index_where.sql
create index foo_bar on foo (
  bar,
  baz desc,
)
storing (qux)
where bar is not null and baz is not null
, interleave in parent
options (locality_group = 'spill_to_hdd')

--- AST
&ast.CreateIndex{
  Rparen: 49,
  Name:   &ast.Path{
    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
      &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 13,
        NameEnd: 20,
        Name:    "foo_bar",
      },
    },
  },
  TableName: &ast.Path{
    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
      &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 24,
        NameEnd: 27,
        Name:    "foo",
      },
    },
  },
  Keys: []*ast.IndexKey{
    &ast.IndexKey{
      DirPos: -1,
      Name:   &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 32,
        NameEnd: 35,
        Name:    "bar",
      },
    },
    &ast.IndexKey{
      DirPos: 43,
      Name:   &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 39,
        NameEnd: 42,
        Name:    "baz",
      },
      Dir: "DESC",
    },
  },
  Storing: &ast.Storing{
    Storing: 51,
    Rparen:  63,
    Columns: []*ast.Ident{
      &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 60,
        NameEnd: 63,
        Name:    "qux",
      },
    },
  },
  Where: &ast.Where{
    Where: 65,
    Expr:  &ast.BinaryExpr{
      Op:   "AND",
      Left: &ast.IsNullExpr{
        Null: 82,
        Not:  true,
        Left: &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 71,
          NameEnd: 74,
          Name:    "bar",
        },
      },
      Right: &ast.IsNullExpr{
        Null: 102,
        Not:  true,
        Left: &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 91,
          NameEnd: 94,
          Name:    "baz",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  InterleaveIn: &ast.InterleaveIn{
    Comma:     107,
    TableName: &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 123,
      NameEnd: 129,
      Name:    "parent",
    },
  },
  Options: &ast.Options{
    Options: 130,
    Rparen:  170,
    Records: []*ast.OptionsDef{
      &ast.OptionsDef{
        Name: &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 139,
          NameEnd: 153,
          Name:    "locality_group",
        },
        Value: &ast.StringLiteral{
          ValuePos: 156,
          ValueEnd: 170,
          Value:    "spill_to_hdd",
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
CREATE INDEX foo_bar ON foo(bar, baz DESC) STORING (qux) WHERE bar IS NOT NULL AND baz IS NOT NULL, INTERLEAVE IN parent OPTIONS (locality_group = "spill_to_hdd")
